Scientific Focus

Ge-STAR contributes to fundamental physics with high-purity germanium detectors for:

  • Dark matter searches
  • Neutrinoless double beta decay
  • Coherent elastic neutrino-nucleus scattering
  • Radiation detection for space and security applications
